name: T4.5-synthetic-screen-real-camera-1440p
description: Mirror of T4.4: synthetic 4K screen + REAL camera. Isolates the other direction. Interpretation together with T4.4: if T4.2 hangs, T4.5 passes, and T4.4 hangs → screen capture is the differentiator. If T4.2 hangs, T4.5 hangs, and T4.4 passes → camera capture is the differentiator. If both T4.4 and T4.5 pass while T4.2 hangs → it's the interaction of both real streams that matters.
